content.content:
1→package transflow
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"os"
     7→	"path/filepath"
     8→	"strings"
     9→	"time"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/cli/common"
    12→	"github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/internal/git/provider"
    13→)
    14→
    15→// GitOperationsInterface defines the Git operations needed by the runner
    16→type GitOperationsInterface interface {
    17→	CloneRepository(ctx context.Context, repoURL, branch, targetPath string) error
    18→	CreateBranchAndCheckout(ctx context.Context, repoPath, branchName string) error
    19→	CommitChanges(ctx context.Context, repoPath, message string) error
    20→	PushBranch(ctx context.Context, repoPath, remoteURL, branchName string) error
    21→}
    22→
    23→// RecipeExecutorInterface defines the recipe execution interface
    24→type RecipeExecutorInterface interface {
    25→	ExecuteRecipes(ctx context.Context, workspacePath string, recipeIDs []string) error
    26→}
    27→
    28→// BuildCheckerInterface defines the build check interface
    29→type BuildCheckerInterface interface {
    30→	CheckBuild(ctx context.Context, config common.DeployConfig) (*common.DeployResult, error)
    31→}
    32→
    33→// StepResult represents the result of executing a single step
    34→type StepResult struct {
    35→	StepID   string
    36→	Success  bool
    37→	Message  string
    38→	Duration time.Duration
    39→}
    40→
    41→// TransflowResult represents the overall result of a transflow execution
    42→type TransflowResult struct {
    43→	Success        bool
    44→	WorkflowID     string
    45→	BranchName     string
    46→	CommitSHA      string
    47→	BuildVersion   string
    48→	StepResults    []StepResult
    49→	ErrorMessage   string
    50→	Duration       time.Duration
    51→	HealingSummary *TransflowHealingSummary
    52→	MRURL          string // GitLab merge request URL if created
    53→}
    54→
    55→// Summary returns a human-readable summary of the transflow execution
    56→func (r *TransflowResult) Summary() string {
    57→	var sb strings.Builder
    58→
    59→	sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("Workflow: %s\n", r.WorkflowID))
    60→
    61→	if r.Success {
    62→		sb.WriteString("Status: SUCCESS\n")
    63→	} else {
    64→		sb.WriteString("Status: FAILED\n")
    65→	}
    66→
    67→	if r.BranchName != "" {
    68→		sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("Branch: %s\n", r.BranchName))
    69→	}
    70→
    71→	if r.CommitSHA != "" {
    72→		sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("Commit: %s\n", r.CommitSHA))
    73→	}
    74→
    75→	if r.BuildVersion != "" {
    76→		sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("Build: %s\n", r.BuildVersion))
    77→	}
    78→
    79→	if !r.Success && r.ErrorMessage != "" {
    80→		sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("Error: %s\n", r.ErrorMessage))
    81→	}
    82→
    83→	sb.WriteString("Steps:\n")
    84→	for _, step := range r.StepResults {
    85→		status := "✓"
    86→		if !step.Success {
    87→			status = "✗"
    88→		}
    89→		sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("  %s %s: %s\n", status, step.StepID, step.Message))
    90→	}
    91→
    92→	// Include healing summary if self-healing was enabled
    93→	if r.HealingSummary != nil && r.HealingSummary.Enabled {
    94→		sb.WriteString("\nSelf-Healing:\n")
    95→		if r.HealingSummary.AttemptsCount > 0 {
    96→			sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("  Attempts: %d/%d\n", r.HealingSummary.AttemptsCount, r.HealingSummary.MaxRetries))
    97→			sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("  Successful fixes: %d\n", r.HealingSummary.TotalHealed))
    98→			sb.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("  Final result: %s\n", map[bool]string{true: "SUCCESS", false: "FAILED"}[r.HealingSummary.FinalSuccess]))
    99→
   100→			for _, attempt := range r.HealingSummary.Attempts {
